Self.Wiki: Defines parameters related to model parts for Boss cuts.\nRow ID links with BossPartsParam.

disableRagdollParts.Wiki: Which ragdoll parts to invalidate when broken.

disableHitParts1.Wiki: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 1.

disableHitParts2.Wiki: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 2.

disableHitParts3.Wiki: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 3.

disableHitParts4.Wiki: Which hit part to invalidate when broken for slot 4.

disableResidentSfxNo.AltName: SFX Group ID to Disable when Broken
disableResidentSfxNo.Wiki: The SFX group ID to disable when broken.

enableWeapon1.Wiki: If enabled, the equipment in slot 1 is enabled.

enableWeapon2.Wiki: If enabled, the equipment in slot 2 is enabled.

enableWeapon3.Wiki: If enabled, the equipment in slot 3 is enabled.

enableWeapon4.Wiki: If enabled, the equipment in slot 4 is enabled.

enableWeapon5.Wiki: If enabled, the equipment in slot 5 is enabled.

enableWeapon6.Wiki: If enabled, the equipment in slot 6 is enabled.

disableDamageDpId1.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableDamageDpId2.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableDamageDpId3.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableDamageDpId4.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableDamageDpId5.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableDamageDpId6.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableDamageDpId7.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableDamageDpId8.Wiki: The dummy polygon used damage upon part break.

disableSfxDpId1.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSfxDpId2.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSfxDpId3.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSfxDpId4.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSfxDpId5.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSfxDpId6.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSfxDpId7.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSfxDpId8.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the SFX upon part break.

disableSoundDpId1.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.

disableSoundDpId2.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.

disableSoundDpId3.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.

disableSoundDpId4.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.

disableSoundDpId5.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.

disableSoundDpId6.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.

disableSoundDpId7.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.

disableSoundDpId8.Wiki: The dummy polygon used for the sound upon part break.
